# Kartoney.com

> Kartoney (كارتوني) is the largest free Arabic cartoon and anime streaming library, featuring over 8,600 episodes across 107 series spanning 4 decades (1980s–2010s).

**About**
Kartoney.com is a free Arabic-language cartoon and anime streaming platform. The site offers dubbed Arabic versions of classic and modern animated series. Content is organized by genre, era, and type for easy discovery.

**Content Library**
- **Total Series**: 107 cartoon and anime series
- **Total Episodes**: 8,611 episodes
- **Languages**: Arabic dubbed
- **Genres**: Action (أكشن), Adventure (مغامرة), Comedy (كوميدي), Drama (دراما), Fantasy (فنتازيا), Mystery (غموض), Romance (رومانسي), Sci-Fi (خيال علمي), Sports (رياضي), Family (عائلي), Educational (تعليمي)
- **Eras**: 1980s classics, 1990s golden age, 2000s modern, 2010s contemporary

**Features**
- Browse by genre, era, or type
- Search in Arabic and English
- Season and episode navigation
- Integrated video player with episode sidebar
- Responsive design (mobile + desktop)
- RTL (right-to-left) Arabic interface

**Technical Details**
- Static, pre-rendered multi-page site (one crawlable HTML page per series and per episode)
- Each page ships full text content (series names, descriptions, episode titles) in the HTML
- No backend server required; no client-side database
- Structured data: WebSite, Organization, TVSeries, VideoObject, BreadcrumbList (schema.org)

**Contact**
- Website: https://kartoney.com
- Domain: kartoney.com

## Key URLs

- [Home](https://kartoney.com/): The main landing page.
- [Full Library](https://kartoney.com/library/): Complete catalog of all 107 cartoon and anime series.
- [Genres Index](https://kartoney.com/genre/): Browse and filter series by genre.
- [Sitemap Index](https://kartoney.com/sitemap.xml): The XML sitemap containing references to all pages.

## Popular Cartoon Series

- [Detective Conan / المحقق كونان](https://kartoney.com/cartoon/detective-conan/): 437 episodes, Action/Mystery.
- [Naruto / ناروتو عربي](https://kartoney.com/cartoon/naruto/): 692 episodes, Action/Adventure.
- [One Piece / وان بيس](https://kartoney.com/cartoon/one-piece/): 936 episodes, Action/Adventure/Fantasy.
- [Slam Dunk / سلام دانك](https://kartoney.com/cartoon/slam-dunk/): 106 episodes, Sports/Comedy.
- [Heidi / هايدي](https://kartoney.com/cartoon/heidi/): 94 episodes, Family/Drama.
- [Grendizer / جراندايزر](https://kartoney.com/cartoon/grendizer/): 74 episodes, Sci-Fi/Action.
- [Yu-Gi-Oh / يوقي يو](https://kartoney.com/cartoon/yugioh/): 546 episodes, Action.
- [Captain Tsubasa / كابتن ماجد](https://kartoney.com/cartoon/captain-tsubasa/): 128 episodes, Sports.

## Browse by Genre

- [Action / أكشن](https://kartoney.com/genre/action/)
- [Adventure / مغامرة](https://kartoney.com/genre/adventure/)
- [Sports / رياضي](https://kartoney.com/genre/sports/)
- [Sci-Fi / خيال علمي](https://kartoney.com/genre/sci-fi/)
- [Mystery / غموض](https://kartoney.com/genre/mystery/)
- [Family / عائلي](https://kartoney.com/genre/family/)
- [Drama / دراما](https://kartoney.com/genre/drama/)
- [Comedy / كوميدي](https://kartoney.com/genre/comedy/)
- [Fantasy / فنتازيا](https://kartoney.com/genre/fantasy/)
- [Educational / تعليمي](https://kartoney.com/genre/educational/)

## Browse by Era

- [1980s Classics / كرتون الثمانينات](https://kartoney.com/era/80s/)
- [1990s Golden Age / كرتون التسعينات](https://kartoney.com/era/90s/)
- [2000s Modern / كرتون الألفية](https://kartoney.com/era/2000s/)
- [2010s Contemporary / أنمي حديث](https://kartoney.com/era/2010s/)

## Browse by Type

- [Anime / أنمي](https://kartoney.com/category/anime/)
- [Classic Cartoons / كرتون كلاسيكي](https://kartoney.com/category/classic/)
- [Modern Cartoons / كرتون حديث](https://kartoney.com/category/modern/)
